title: French Cobblemon Names
description: A resource pack that lets you enjoy French Pokémon names in Cobblemon while keeping your Minecraft interface in English!
body:
# French Cobblemon Names

A resource pack that lets you enjoy French Pokémon names in Cobblemon while keeping your Minecraft interface in English!

![Salamèche](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/247485cd0c3a9287a2959a041523cb3ad8990f36_0.webp)

## 🎯 Purpose

Do you want to play Minecraft in English but prefer the French names for your Pokémon in Cobblemon? This resource pack solves that exact problem! It overrides Cobblemon's language files to display French Pokémon names while keeping the rest of your game in English.

## ✨ Features

- French Pokémon names in Cobblemon
- Keeps Minecraft's interface in English
- No mod file modifications required
- Easy to install and use
- Compatible with other resource packs

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the resource pack
2. Place it in your resourcepacks folder:
   - Standard Minecraft: `%appdata%/.minecraft/resourcepacks/`
   - GDLauncher: `GDLauncher/instances/[YOUR_INSTANCE]/resourcepacks/`
3. Launch Minecraft
4. Go to Options → Resource Packs
5. Move the French Cobblemon Names pack to the active column
6. Click Done

## 🔧 Requirements

- Minecraft 1.2X.X
- Cobblemon 1.5.0+

## ⚠️ Known Issues

- None currently reported

## 🤝 Contributing

Feel free to contribute to this resource pack on [GitHub](https://github.com/Decryptu/french-cobblemon-names)! Whether it's bug reports, suggestions, or improvements, all contributions are welcome.

## 🌟 Credits

- Original Cobblemon mod team for creating Cobblemon
- French translations from the official Cobblemon mod

## 📫 Support

If you encounter any issues or have questions:
- Open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/Decryptu/french-cobblemon-names)
